大发精准计划团队群【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239049055_63450424<br>vk.com/topic-239049073_63731174<br>vk.com/topic-239049059_64312621<br>vk.com/topic-239049147_64976635<br>vk.com/topic-239049085_63450426<br>vk.com/topic-239049112_64140231<br>vk.com/topic-238978653_63731173<br>vk.com/topic-239049148_64041110<br>vk.com/topic-239046726_63875372<br>vk.com/topic-239049087_64976654<br>vk.com/topic-239049058_64041087<br>vk.com/topic-239043994_63528591<br>vk.com/topic-239049084_63528586<br>vk.com/topic-239049070_64617771<br>vk.com/topic-239049080_64617767<br>vk.com/topic-239049110_64617766<br>vk.com/topic-239049053_63731190<br>vk.com/topic-239015749_64312649<br>vk.com/topic-239049095_63450450<br>vk.com/topic-239049057_64976660<br>vk.com/topic-239049062_64140243<br>vk.com/topic-239049134_63528599<br>vk.com/topic-239049078_64041129<br>vk.com/topic-239049052_64140264<br>vk.com/topic-239049069_64312682<br>vk.com/topic-239049098_64041127<br>vk.com/topic-238994591_65196306<br>vk.com/topic-239049141_65196294<br>vk.com/topic-239029564_63528667<br>vk.com/topic-239049096_63875352<br>vk.com/topic-239049082_64140257<br>vk.com/topic-239049056_63875334<br>vk.com/topic-238833143_63731203<br>vk.com/top
